violations.text: The plumbing to the (bar) handsink is in poor repair. Leak observed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/26/2023

The presence of flies are not controlled as evidenced by live activity. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the (bar) refrigeration have an accumulation of water and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2023
The establishment is lacking hot water. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2023

The walls in the bar area and ceiling in the storage room are in poor repair. Inspector observed loose FRP, exposed wood and missing ceiling tile. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2023
